Name: Set Vercel environment variables
Description: MANUAL: Add Supabase + Stripe env vars to Vercel project (photo-sorter). Kyle provides values: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY

Name: Re-enable Supabase auth middleware
Description: Restore src/middleware.ts to check Supabase sessions. Redirect unauthed from /dashboard to /auth/login. Redirect authed away from /auth/*. Check onboarding status. File: src/middleware.ts

Name: Reconnect dashboard to Supabase
Description: Replace static mock at src/app/dashboard/page.tsx with server component using DashboardShell (src/components/features/workspace/DashboardShell.tsx). Fetch workspaces, projects, photo counts from Supabase.

Name: Reconnect project workspace
Description: Replace static mock at src/app/dashboard/project/[id]/page.tsx with WorkspaceView (src/components/features/workspace/WorkspaceView.tsx). Fetch real project + media from Supabase.

Name: Reconnect auth pages to useAuth
Description: Restore login/signup pages to use useAuth hook (src/hooks/useAuth.ts) for signIn, signUp, signInWithGoogle, resetPassword. Files: src/app/auth/login/page.tsx, src/app/auth/signup/page.tsx

Name: Reconnect onboarding wizard
Description: Restore OnboardingWizard (src/components/features/onboarding/OnboardingWizard.tsx) that creates profiles, workspaces, first project in Supabase. File: src/app/onboarding/page.tsx

Name: Reconnect gallery to real data
Description: Replace static gallery at src/app/gallery/[id]/page.tsx with real GalleryView + AccessGate + GalleryPaywall from src/components/features/gallery/.

Name: Build Cloudflare upload handler
Description: After Supabase Storage upload, push to Cloudflare Images for CDN transforms. Update media row with cloudflare_image_id. File: src/lib/cloudflare.ts (currently stub). Ref: SPEC.md Section 7.

Name: Implement thumbnail generation
Description: Auto-generate thumbnail variant URLs via Cloudflare transforms. Wire into MediaCard and PhotoGrid to use real image URLs. Files: src/lib/cloudflare.ts, src/components/features/MediaCard.tsx

Name: Implement watermark overlay
Description: Cloudflare Images overlay transform for PROOF watermark on preview-level gallery access. Applied at CDN level. File: src/lib/cloudflare.ts. Ref: SPEC.md Section 10.

Name: Set up Resend SDK
Description: Install Resend, configure API key, create send wrapper at src/lib/email/send.ts. Support HTML templates via react-email.

Name: Build 6 email templates
Description: Create react-email templates: Welcome, GalleryInvitation, ProjectPublished, PaymentConfirmation, PaymentReceived, PaymentFailed. Files: src/lib/email/templates/*.tsx. Ref: SPEC.md Section 11.

Name: Wire email triggers
Description: Send Welcome on signup, GalleryInvitation on client invite, ProjectPublished on publish, Payment emails from Stripe webhook. Files: src/app/api/webhooks/stripe/route.ts, auth callback.

Name: Build real notification system
Description: Insert notification rows in Supabase on key events. Fetch real notifications for bell dropdown in layout. Replace mock data. Files: src/app/dashboard/layout.tsx, new: src/lib/notifications.ts

Name: Wire publish flow to Supabase
Description: Connect publish page to real Supabase update — set status to published, generate shareable gallery URL. File: src/app/dashboard/project/[id]/publish/page.tsx

Name: Implement magic link invitations
Description: Send magic link email via Resend, create project_clients row in Supabase. Client clicks link → OAuth → auto-linked. Ref: SPEC.md Section 10.

Name: Build resolve_gallery_access RPC
Description: Create Supabase RPC function checking project_clients, project_pricing, bookings, file_purchases for access level + payment status. Files: supabase/migrations/, src/lib/queries/

Name: Build ZIP export
Description: Generate ZIP organized by category folders. Use JSZip. Serve as download from API route. Files: src/lib/utils/zip.ts, src/app/api/export/route.ts

Name: Wire account settings to Supabase
Description: Connect settings page to Supabase profile update — name, business name, avatar upload. File: src/app/dashboard/settings/page.tsx

Name: Wire Stripe Connect onboarding
Description: Real Stripe Connect OAuth flow — create express account, generate onboarding link, handle callback. Files: src/app/dashboard/settings/connect/page.tsx, src/lib/stripe/connect.ts

Name: Implement batch rename engine
Description: Build rename logic expanding template tokens ({project}, {category}, {n}, {date}) and updating media.display_name in Supabase. Files: src/lib/utils/rename.ts, src/app/dashboard/project/[id]/rename/page.tsx

Name: Add loading states and error boundaries
Description: Add skeleton loaders for data-fetching pages, friendly empty state messages, error.tsx boundaries for all route segments.

Name: Mobile responsive pass
Description: Test and fix all pages on mobile viewports. Sidebar collapses, grids adapt, forms stack.

Name: End-to-end smoke test
Description: Full photographer journey: signup → onboard → create project → upload → AI sort → review → publish → invite → client views → client pays → download

Name: Stripe test mode verification
Description: Verify all payment flows in Stripe test mode: subscription checkout, gallery purchase, Connect payout, webhook processing.

Name: Security review
Description: Audit all RLS policies, ensure no secrets in client code, verify signed URL expiration, check CORS headers.

Name: Performance audit
Description: Run Lighthouse on key pages, check bundle size, ensure images use next/image or Cloudflare CDN.

Name: Production deploy 🚀
Description: Switch from test to live Stripe keys, connect custom domain, final production deployment. MILESTONE.
